table.name: vtiger_floor
table.sql: CREATE TABLE `vtiger_floor` ( `floorid` int(19) NOT NULL, `floor_number` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `floor_plan` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`floorid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8

table.name: vtiger_floorcf
table.sql: CREATE TABLE `vtiger_floorcf` ( `floorid` int(19) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`floorid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8
